title: Argent Codex
intro: The Argent Gryphon adheres to a codex — a set of regulations for daily life, behaviour, and values — emphasising chivalry, piety, and a strict moral code. Written by Roderic Rivershaw, it outlines the ideal conduct for a Gryphon, encompassing both monastic life and military service.

items.title: Exhort Supremacy
items.text: Let thy steel and magic bolster the Gryphon's superiority.

items.title: Secure the Advantage
items.text: Strike swiftly, audaciously and without warning.

items.title: Serve Dauntlessly
items.text: Let humility be cast aside, and boldness be thy crown.

items.title: Seek Wisdom
items.text: Knowledge is the flame by which decadence is purged.

items.title: Show No Mercy
items.text: Unsheathe thy weapons without pity, for mercy prolongs suffering.

items.title: Keep the Vigil
items.text: Wherever the Gryphon flies, let no infamy go unchallenged.

items.title: Unyielding Reputation
items.text: Should thy end come, let them pay the highest toll.
